profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Menn Teknologi Indonesia Tbk provides digital solutions to logistics and transportation industries in Indonesia. The company operates through GPS Rental, IT Services, and GPS Sales segments. It operates Mennconnect, a platform that connects Internet of Things (IoT) devices, multimode solutions, fleet management, transport management, and warehouse management. The company's IoT devices, includes black box carbon black, magneto high-security mobile GPS, MENN DVR TK/BSJ, temperature sensors, speed alarms, smart locks, rear parking sensors, road parking IoT sensors, environment IoT sensors, and air quality IoT sensors; agri-food IoT solutions, such as soil temperature and humidity, automatic pressure, rain and snow, carbon dioxide, and air quality sensors, as well as illumination transmitter and tipper type rain gauge products; and cold-chain solutions comprising vehicle front back CCTVs, AI-based driver safety monitoring, temperature monitoring, black box DVR, and clod server products. It also provides fleet management, warehouse management, transport management, multimode solutions, and cold-chain and temperature monitoring dashboard solutions. PT Menn Teknologi Indonesia Tbk was founded in 2014 and is based in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.
